_comment: Static rotation table for Zapier-based Pinterest auto-pinner. Index = day-of-year % len(pins) (deterministic, no state file needed). Images hosted publicly in this same midwestmade4u-pins repo. MIRRORED HERE (public repo) on 2026-07-03 because the private midwestmade4u-shop copy requires an auth token on every raw.githubusercontent.com fetch, which scheduled tasks cannot supply -- this public copy is the primary source SKILL.md fetches from. Keep in sync with midwestmade4u-shop/tracking/pinterest_zapier_pins.json (editorial source of truth) whenever a pin is added. Bundle pins (021-027) point to a dedicated 'Disney Trip Planning Bundles' board (id 1078612248196086848) as of 2026-07-03.
